title: Whole Cake Island Comes Into View
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Reiju, Pekoms, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Pudding, Big Mom Pirates as The rescue team reaches Big Mom’s territory and learns how Sanji is trapped by family and political pressure.
scene: The Sanji retrieval team enters Big Mom’s sphere of influence, where every friendly face may be connected to the wedding trap.

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: So this is where Sanji is?!

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: MAMA will never willingly let Sanji go.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Tomorrow, let us meet...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: whole cake

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On the Southwestern Coast of Whole Cake Island!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I promise you...I'll bring Sanji to you guys!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you sure?! won't big mom punish you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm still her daughter. Don't worry about me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Come to think of it, you guys will be the ones going deep into enemy territory. Worry about yourselves!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I'm certain the strong bonds you share for one another will see you through!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Still... I can't help but feel a little sad about how things turned out...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who knows ...the next person mama wants me to marry...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Might turn out to be even more wonderful! :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Such a mature and sensible child!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you really the daughter of one of the yonkou?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: knock knock

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Miss pudding!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We've come for you!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: From now until the wedding,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We ask that you kindly cease all work-related activities!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: But I still have guests, and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Ah yes. You guys from earlier.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I've gathered together every- thing you ordered.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I laid it all out over there, feel free to do with it as you please! You sure you'll be okay with all that stuff?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Thank you! Yes, we'll be fine!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Choco Burger ?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Quit dawdling.

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: We need to hurry. Pekoms is waiting.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But... but... a choco burger! Buy me one... Please, Nami!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Choco Pasta...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We've already got plenty of food!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Choco- Late fried chicken...

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: Pekoms?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wasn't he supposed to wait for us here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: That's strange...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's probably taking a dump or something. Someone check the bathroom!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Guys!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I found a message in the bath- room!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: "Turn back"?!

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: Did pekoms write this?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Who else could have?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Did someone presuppass on the ship?

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: Maybe Pekoms got kidnapped?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This could possibly mean that we are no longer flying under the radar here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At any rate, this is a serious problem!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Turn back..." Probably means that if we don't turn back, some- thing bad is gonna happen to us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I think.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yeah.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Right! Everyone, make sure you don't forget this message!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We're gonna continue on ahead!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Things are finally starting to get inter- eating!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Approach storyline with 51 dialogue beats. The crew moves from Zou toward Big Mom’s territory and begins to understand the scale of Sanji’s predicament.
